modules.gui.palette package#

Submodules#

modules.gui.palette.buttons module#

class ModeButton(parent, manager)[source]#

Bases: MoveableButton

paintEvent(event)[source]#

Add a highlighting border to selected buttons.

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("ModeButton" inherits "MoveableButton": )#
class MoveableButton(parent, manager, group_name)[source]#

Bases: QPushButton

mouseMoveEvent(event)[source]#

Called when button is moved.

mousePressEvent(event)[source]#

Called when button is pressed.

mouseReleaseEvent(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is released.

setRightClickEvent(fn)[source]#
staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("MoveableButton" inherits "QPushButton": )#
class PaletteButton(parent, manager)[source]#

Bases: MoveableButton

openDialog()[source]#

Change the attributes of a trace on the palette.

paintEvent(event)[source]#

Draw the trace on the button.

setTrace(trace: Trace)[source]#

Create a palette button object.

Params:

trace (Trace): the trace that is displayed on the button

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("PaletteButton" inherits "MoveableButton": )#

modules.gui.palette.mouse_palette module#

class MousePalette(mainwindow: QWidget)[source]#

Bases: object

activateModeButton(bname: str)[source]#

Executed when any mouse mode button is clicked: changes mouse mode.

Params:

bname (str): the name of the clicked button

activatePaletteButton(bpos: int)[source]#

Executed when palette button is clicked: changes mouse trace.

Params:

bpos (int): the position of the palette button

close()[source]#

Close all buttons

createBCButtons()[source]#

Create the brightnes/contrast buttons.

createIncrementButtons()[source]#

Create the section increment buttons.

createModeButton(name: str, sc: str, pos: int, mouse_mode: int)[source]#

Creates a new mouse mode button.

Params:

name (str): the name of the button (and PNG file) sc (str): the shortcut character for the button pos (int): the position of the button mouse_mode (int): the mode this button is connected to

createPaletteButton(trace: Trace, pos: int)[source]#

Create a palette button on the dock.

Params:

trace (Trace): the trace to go on the button pos (int): the position of the button (assumes 20 buttons)

createPaletteSideButtons()[source]#

Create the palette increment buttons.

getBounds()[source]#

Get the bounds for the buttons.

getButtonCoords(group)[source]#

Get the coordinates for a button group.

Params:

group (str): the name of the button group.

incrementPalette(up)[source]#

Increment the palette.

Params:

up (bool): True if increment higher, False if increment lower

incrementSection(down=False)[source]#

Increment the section.

modifyAllPaletteButtons()[source]#

Modify all the palette buttons through a single dialog.

modifyFlag()[source]#

Modify the default flag.

modifyPalette(trace_list: list)[source]#

Modify all of the palette traces.

Params:

trace_list (list): the list of traces to set the palette buttons

modifyPaletteButton(bpos: int, trace: Trace = None)[source]#

Opens dialog to modify palette button.

Params:

bpos (int): the position of the palette button

moveButton(dx, dy, group)[source]#

Move a button group.

Params:

dx (int): the x-value movement for the button dy (int): the y-value movement for the button group (str): the name of the button group

paletteButtonChanged(button: PaletteButton)[source]#

Executed when user changes palette trace: ensure that tracing pencil is updated.

Params:

button (PaletteButton): the button that was changed

pasteAttributesToButton(trace: Trace, use_shape=False)[source]#

Paste the attributes of a trace to the current button.

Params:

trace (Trace): the trace to paste

placeBCButtons()[source]#

Place the brightness/contrast buttons.

placeIncrementButtons()[source]#

Place the increment buttons on the field

placeLabel()[source]#

Place the trace palette label.

placeModeButton(button, pos: int)[source]#

Place the mode button in the main window.

Params:

button (ModeButton): the button to place pos (int): the position of the button

placePaletteButton(button: PaletteButton, pos: int)[source]#

Place the palette button in the main window.

Params:

button (PaletteButton): the palette button to move pos (int): its position

placePaletteSideButtons()[source]#
reset()[source]#

Reset the mouse palette when opening a new series.

resetPalette()[source]#

Reset the palette to the default traces.

resetPos()[source]#

Reset the positions of the buttons.

resize()[source]#

Move the buttons to fit the main window.

setBrightness(b: int)[source]#

Set the brightness for the current section.

setContrast(c: int)[source]#

Set the contrast for the current section.

setFlag(name: str = None, color: tuple = None, font_size: int = None, display_flags: str = None)[source]#

Set the default flag in the palette.

setPaletteButtonTip(b: PaletteButton, pos: int)[source]#

Set the tool tip for a palette button.

Params:

b (PaletteButton): the palette button to modify pos (int): the position of the button

toggleBC()[source]#

Hide/Unhide the brightness/contrast buttons.

toggleIncrement()[source]#

Hide/Unhide the increment buttons.

togglePalette()[source]#

Hide/Unhide the mouse palette.

updateBC()[source]#

Update the brightness/contrast on the slider to the section.

updateLabel()[source]#

Update the name of the trace palette label.

modules.gui.palette.zarr_palette module#

class ZarrPalette(group_names: list, mainwindow: QWidget)[source]#

Bases: object

changeGroup(group_name)[source]#

Change the group for the overlay displayed.

Params:

group_name (str): the name of the group to change to

close()[source]#

Close all widgets.

placeWidgets()[source]#

Place the widgets in the correct locations.
